text: Honestly, the biggest thing for me is voice — it needs to feel like a smart friend talking to you, not a brand trying to sell you something. I'm always pushing for benefits over features, because nobody actually cares what your product *does* until they understand why it matters to *them*. And the hook has to earn attention — if the first line doesn't make someone stop scrolling, the rest doesn't matter. Conversational and confident is the vibe I'm always chasing.
